line_ref: Example beat — two hero-direct clips, single scene. Demonstrates a locked script_line on clip 1 (would synthesize on a full render) and a placeholder script_line on clip 2 (ships silent). Structurally modeled on a real production beat; all copy, ids, and paths below are neutral placeholders.

clips.animation_direction: The character turns toward camera and gives a small confident nod, then a brief pause holding a natural, relaxed pose. Steady camera, smooth continuous motion, even lighting.
clips.script_line: This is an example line for the first clip.

clips.animation_direction: The character leans slightly forward and gives a small shrug, then a brief satisfied nod. Steady camera, smooth continuous motion, even lighting.
